helper_text: Candidate's passport-size photograph with clear face and plain background.
sample_instruction: Upload a clear passport-size photograph. Face should be visible, not cropped, and background should be simple.
important_visible_fields: Full face | Plain background | No sunglasses or filters | Recent photo (within 6 months)

helper_text: Clear front-side image or PDF of the candidate's PAN card.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable PAN card copy where name, PAN number, and date of birth are clearly visible.
important_visible_fields: PAN number (10 characters) | Name | Father's name | Date of birth | Photograph | Signature

helper_text: Clear Aadhaar card copy of the candidate. Front and back if available.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable Aadhaar copy. Masking can be accepted if current business rules allow it.
important_visible_fields: 12-digit Aadhaar number | Name | Date of birth | Gender | Photograph | Address (back side) | QR code (back side)

helper_text: Passport first and last page showing identity and address details.
sample_instruction: Upload clear passport pages showing candidate identity, passport number, validity, and address details.
important_visible_fields: Passport number | Name | Date of birth | Nationality | Date of issue | Date of expiry | Photograph | MRZ band

helper_text: Class 10 marksheet showing student name, board, year, and marks clearly.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable 10th marksheet with student name, passing year, board, and marks visible.
important_visible_fields: Student name | Board name | Roll number | Passing year | Subject-wise marks | Total marks / percentage | Result

helper_text: Class 12 marksheet showing student name, board, year, and marks clearly.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable 12th marksheet with student name, passing year, board, and marks visible.
important_visible_fields: Student name | Board name | Stream | Roll number | Passing year | Subject-wise marks | Total / percentage | Result

helper_text: Latest or consolidated graduation marksheet.
sample_instruction: Upload the latest semester or consolidated graduation marksheet showing student name, university, course, and marks/CGPA.
important_visible_fields: Student name | University name | Course / programme | Semester or year | Course-wise grades | SGPA / CGPA | Result

helper_text: Final graduation degree certificate issued by the university.
sample_instruction: Upload the final degree certificate if issued by the university.
important_visible_fields: University name | Student name | Degree awarded | Completion year | Certificate number | Seal | Signature

helper_text: Post-graduation marksheet, if applicable.
sample_instruction: Upload post-graduation marksheet only if applicable to the candidate's academic profile.
important_visible_fields: Student name | University name | Programme | Semester or year | Course-wise grades | SGPA / CGPA | Result

helper_text: Post-graduation degree certificate, if applicable.
sample_instruction: Upload post-graduation degree certificate only if applicable.
important_visible_fields: University name | Student name | Degree awarded | Completion year | Certificate number | Seal | Signature

helper_text: Official offer/admission letter from the university or institution.
sample_instruction: Upload the official admission or offer letter showing university name, course, intake, and student name.
important_visible_fields: Institution header | Student name | Programme | Intake | Campus / country | Offer status | Reference number | Signature

helper_text: Country-specific admission confirmation document: I-20 for USA, CAS for UK, CoE for Australia.
sample_instruction: Upload the applicable country-specific confirmation document. I-20 for USA, CAS for UK, CoE for Australia.
important_visible_fields: Document type (I-20 / CAS / CoE) | Student name | Institution | Programme start date | Reference number (SEVIS / CAS / CoE) | Country tag

helper_text: English language test scorecard, if available or required.
sample_instruction: Upload official IELTS, TOEFL, PTE, or equivalent English proficiency scorecard if available or required.
important_visible_fields: Candidate name | Test type | Test date | Listening score | Reading score | Writing score | Speaking score | Overall score

helper_text: GRE official scorecard, if available or required.
sample_instruction: Upload official GRE scorecard if available or required for the course/lender.
important_visible_fields: Candidate name | Test date | Verbal Reasoning score | Quantitative Reasoning score | Analytical Writing score | Registration number

helper_text: Co-applicant's passport-size photograph with clear face and plain background.
sample_instruction: Upload a clear passport-size photograph of the co-applicant.
important_visible_fields: Full face | Plain background | No sunglasses or filters | Recent photo (within 6 months)

helper_text: Clear front-side image or PDF of the co-applicant's PAN card.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable PAN card copy where co-applicant name, PAN number, and date of birth are clearly visible.
important_visible_fields: PAN number (10 characters) | Name | Father's name | Date of birth | Photograph | Signature

helper_text: Clear Aadhaar card copy of the co-applicant. Front and back if available.
sample_instruction: Upload a readable Aadhaar copy of the co-applicant.
important_visible_fields: 12-digit Aadhaar number | Name | Date of birth | Gender | Photograph | Address (back side) | QR code (back side)

helper_text: Latest salary slips, preferably last 3 months.
sample_instruction: Upload recent salary slips showing employer name, employee name, salary breakup, and month.
important_visible_fields: Employer name | Employee name | Employee ID | Month | Earnings breakup | Deductions breakup | Net salary | Bank transfer note

helper_text: Latest ITR documents, preferably last 2 years if available.
sample_instruction: Upload recent ITR documents or acknowledgement as per existing business process.
important_visible_fields: Taxpayer name | PAN | Assessment year | Gross income | Tax paid | Acknowledgement number | Filing date

helper_text: Recent bank statement, preferably last 6 months.
sample_instruction: Upload bank statement showing account holder name, bank name, transactions, and statement period.
important_visible_fields: Bank name | Account holder name | Masked account number | Statement period | Opening balance | Transactions | Closing balance

helper_text: Property ownership documents if secured/collateral loan route applies.
sample_instruction: Upload registry, title deed, ownership proof, or related collateral documents only if collateral/secured loan route applies.
important_visible_fields: Owner name | Property address | Plot / survey number | Document / registration number | Property type | Registration date | Signature / seal
